title: Brazilian Shrimp Dumpling Delight
description: A fusion dish of Brazilian and Asian flavors, featuring succulent shrimp dumplings in a crunchy and floral sauce.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
Add Brazilian chili flakes and sauté for another minute.
Add floral soy sauce and stir to combine.
Add Brazilian shrimp and cook until pink, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Add crunchy sesame seeds and stir to combine.
Serve with floral dumplings on the side.
Cook dumplings according to package instructions.
Serve dumplings with shrimp and sauce.
Enjoy your Brazilian Shrimp Dumpling Delight!
